# Planning Memory Rule

Use this workspace rule for planning-first tasks such as technical designs, implementation plans, roadmaps, phased delivery plans, and research-backed execution plans.

- Before producing a plan, first read `/memories/session/plan.md` when it exists.
- Before presenting the final plan to the user, write the current version back to `/memories/session/plan.md`.
- If the user changes scope, priorities, platform targets, or delivery phases, update `/memories/session/plan.md` instead of only describing the change in chat.

This file only defines the always-on planning memory rule. Use the planning agent and planning instructions for the full planning workflow and refinement rules.
